name: LLM inference quantization (8-bit/4-bit)
description: Use lower-precision weights for production inference to reduce VRAM and cost; highlighted as a key deployment technique by Hugging Face.

name: FlashAttention (memory-efficient attention)
description: Memory-efficient attention implementations to improve inference efficiency; called out as a major production optimization technique.

name: Embedding quantization (binary / int8) with rescoring
description: Quantize stored embeddings to cut vector memory/storage (e.g., 32× for binary), optionally rescore candidates to retain retrieval quality.

name: Distributed retrieval via Ray actors for RAG
description: Use separate retrieval workers/actors holding the index to avoid single-coordinator bottlenecks and improve multi-worker scaling in RAG fine-tuning.

name: Request queueing/batching policies for LLM serving
description: Queueing and batching strategies to trade latency for throughput and stabilize tail latency under concurrent load.

name: Microsoft Agent Framework
description: Framework for building agents and graph-based workflows with state management, middleware, checkpointing, and human-in-the-loop support.

name: Chatbot Guardrails Arena (privacy stress testing)
description: Arena-style evaluation with an Elo-rated leaderboard to compare guardrails/LLMs on privacy leakage resistance.

name: AprielGuard (safeguard model for agentic workflows)
description: ServiceNow 8B safeguard model to detect safety risks and adversarial attacks (prompt injection/jailbreaks/tool/memory manipulation) including in agentic workflows.

name: RiskRubric.ai (standardized model risk scoring)
description: Standardized evaluation and scoring across transparency, reliability, security, privacy, safety, and reputation using automated tests and adversarial probes.

name: Regex/static rules as primary guardrail strategy
description: Brittle/non-scalable as a primary defense for modern agentic systems; cited as a workaround that does not scale.
